task_prompt: Run all R scripts in the 01_code folder
tasks: From the replication results in ggdumbbell_SCIXPO.pdf plot, what is the weighted M for exposure to science information on social media platforms (Facebook, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram) across the 68-country sample? Report only the number rounded to two decimal places.

From replication results in Table_BayesReg_SCIXPO.html table, what is the Bayesian regression coefficient (b) for GDP per capita predicting exposure to science information on social media? Report only the number rounded to two decimal places.

From replication results in Table_BayesReg_SCIXPO.html table, what is the median partial eta-squared for GDP per capita predicting exposure to science information in the news?? Report only the number rounded to two decimal places.
